# ModelHint.Name property

OPTIONAL. A hint for a model name (spec §21.2.9). The client SHOULD treat this as a substring of a model name (for example `sonnet` matches `claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022`) and MAY map it to a different provider's model that fills a similar niche.

```csharp
public string? Name { get; set; }
```
